name: the handoff pin is updated to the current composite + consumer-compatibility line (not the stale 230e99d-only)
command: grep -qi 'consumer-compatibility line' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'eaa70d2' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -qi 'since the previous pin' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo pin-updated 1>&2
